title: hieracium murorum f. sylvaticum
intro: Hieracium murorum f. sylvaticum, also known as the wall hawkweed, is a variant of the Hieracium murorum species, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can be utilized to treat conditions such as arthritis and kidney stones. The health benefits of wall hawkweed include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and serve as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of wall hawkweed typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
